issue: Missing meta description tag
recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> with a concise 150-160 character summary of the page

issue: Non-descriptive title tag ('Sample Page')
recommendation: Use a unique, keyword-rich title (50-60 chars) that accurately describes the page content

issue: Missing canonical link tag
recommendation: Add <link rel="canonical" href="..."> to prevent duplicate content issues

issue: No JSON-LD structured data
recommendation: Add JSON-LD (e.g., WebPage, Organization) to help search engines understand page content

issue: Missing Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags
recommendation: Add og:title, og:description, og:image and twitter:card meta tags for social sharing

issue: Render-blocking CSS loaded synchronously in <head>
recommendation: Use media="print" onload="this.media='all'" or preload the stylesheet to avoid render-blocking

issue: @font-face missing font-display: swap
recommendation: Add font-display: swap to prevent invisible text during font loading (FOIT)

issue: Image missing alt attribute
recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute to every for accessibility and image search SEO

issue: Image missing width and height attributes (CLS risk)
recommendation: Add explicit width and height attributes to prevent Cumulative Layout Shift

issue: innerHTML with user input (XSS risk)
recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML to avoid XSS; search engines may flag insecure pages

issue: html lang attribute is 'en' - verify it matches target audience
recommendation: Ensure the lang attribute matches the primary language of the content

issue: No <head> metadata (title, meta description) for this route
recommendation: Ensure this page/route sets a unique <title> and <meta name="description"> via React Helmet or Next.js Head

issue: No canonical URL defined for this route
recommendation: Set a canonical URL for this route to avoid duplicate content issues

issue: No structured data for the dashboard page
recommendation: Add JSON-LD structured data appropriate to the page type (e.g., WebApplication)

issue: Dynamic content insertion without size reservation causes CLS
recommendation: Reserve space with min-height or CSS aspect-ratio for dynamically loaded content

issue: Below-fold image missing loading='lazy'
recommendation: Add loading="lazy" to offscreen images to improve page load performance and Core Web Vitals

issue: Image missing explicit width and height attributes
recommendation: Add width and height to to prevent layout shift (CLS)

issue: Icon buttons missing aria-label
recommendation: Add aria-label to icon-only buttons so screen readers (and search bots) understand their purpose

issue: List items missing stable key prop
recommendation: Add a unique key prop to each mapped element for efficient React rendering

issue: Layout thrashing in useEffect (read then write to DOM)
recommendation: Batch DOM reads and writes or use requestAnimationFrame to avoid forced reflows
